detail.name: main
detail.description: Runs generation with timing to report tokens/second and latency metrics.

takeaway.explain: Warmup runs → timed runs → compute mean/std of metrics. Always warmup to avoid measuring one-time costs (JIT, cache cold starts).
takeaway.rationale: Runs generation with timing to report tokens/second and latency metrics
takeaway.cross_lang: Rust criterion crate, Go testing.B, Java JMH, C++ Google Benchmark
takeaway.gotcha: Without warmup, JIT/cache effects make first runs artificially slow — always discard initial iterations
